tasks.title: Replay parent no-BEL terminal title behavior with RED/GREEN tests

metadata.contract_refs: implements AC4; verifies AC4; respects AC1 C1 C4 DONT1 DONT2 DONT5

tasks.verification: RED: `pnpm test -- src/events/terminal.test.ts` failed with BEL-terminated title output and unsanitized control-byte payloads. GREEN: `pnpm exec vitest run src/events/terminal.test.ts` passed after adding control-byte title sanitization, ST OSC title termination, and sanitized `tmux rename-window` title arguments.

tasks.title: Remove ADV-owned bell runtime state, exports, and arming call sites

metadata.contract_refs: implements AC1 AC2 AC3 AC6; verifies AC1 AC2 AC3 AC6; respects C2 C3 C4 DONT1 DONT3 DONT4

tasks.verification: RED: `pnpm exec vitest run src/events/events.test.ts` failed on new no-BEL transition assertions because status transitions emitted BEL. GREEN: `pnpm exec vitest run src/events/events.test.ts` and `pnpm exec vitest run src/events/terminal.test.ts` passed after removing `ringBell`, `_setBellCallback`, final-alert/debounce state, message.updated bell arming, and bell-only tests. Source search found no remaining runtime `ringBell`, `_setBellCallback`, `armPendingFinalAlert`, or `BELL_DEBOUNCE_MS`; `\x07` remains only in negative test assertions/fixtures.

tasks.title: Rewrite chat-output-display specs/docs for host-owned notifications and no ADV BEL

metadata.contract_refs: implements AC5; verifies AC5; respects AC1 AC4 AC6 C2 C3 C5 DONT2 DONT3

tasks.verification: Updated chat-output-display spec/docs to encode host-owned notifications and no ADV-owned BEL behavior. Added rq-titleBell01 for status/title no-BEL + ST terminator policy, rewrote rq-idleMarker03 away from bell state-machine semantics, updated markdown mirrors/context agreement, and added drift assertions. Verification: RED then GREEN `pnpm exec vitest run src/handoff-footer-drift.test.ts`. Checkpoint commit 95bafea159455f320163ae20ff12332da9b01460.
tasks.summary: Rewrote chat-output-display spec/docs for no ADV BEL policy: bumped spec/mirror to v1.5.0, changed rq-idleMarker03 to host-owned notifications with no ADV-emitted BEL or replacement notification protocol, added rq-titleBell01 requiring title/status paths to avoid BEL, use ST (`ESC \\`) OSC title terminators, and sanitize control bytes. Updated docs/specs/chat-output-display.md and docs/adv-context-agreement.md mirrors. Added handoff-footer drift tests that fail on stale spec version, missing rq-titleBell01/no-BEL wording, or missing markdown mirror requirement IDs.
tasks.implementation_summary: Rewrote chat-output-display spec/docs for no ADV BEL policy: bumped spec/mirror to v1.5.0, changed rq-idleMarker03 to host-owned notifications with no ADV-emitted BEL or replacement notification protocol, added rq-titleBell01 requiring title/status paths to avoid BEL, use ST (`ESC \\`) OSC title terminators, and sanitize control bytes. Updated docs/specs/chat-output-display.md and docs/adv-context-agreement.md mirrors. Added handoff-footer drift tests that fail on stale spec version, missing rq-titleBell01/no-BEL wording, or missing markdown mirror requirement IDs.

tasks.title: Run final verification and BEL-removal audit

metadata.contract_refs: verifies AC1 AC2 AC3 AC4 AC5 AC6 AC7; respects C1 C2 C3 C4 C5 DONT1 DONT2 DONT3 DONT4 DONT5

tasks.verification: Harden production-readiness remediation: added tmux `rename-window -- <title>` end-of-options delimiter with leading-hyphen regression test (validated locally against tmux 3.6 behavior) and made setTitle return success so lastTitle is only advanced after successful title emission. Added RED/GREEN retry test for failed title emission. Verified terminal suite, focused regression suites, `pnpm run check`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm run build`, runtime no-BEL audit, and raw BEL byte audit passed.

wisdom.content: For spec/docs changes, add a drift assertion that the markdown mirror lists every JSON requirement ID. This catches stale human docs when spec.json gains requirements such as rq-titleBell01 or tool-title requirements.

Full test suites in ADV worktrees can expose stale tests that still expect source-checkout plugin paths even though deploy-local.sh now registers the stable runtime plugin path under `$HOME/.local/share/Advance/plugin`. Treat this as contract drift: align tests to runtime plugin path and keep source paths only for asset copy/build inputs.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved proposal via inline Tier A reply: `continue`. Problem statement, scope, success criteria, affected code, constraints, and discovery agenda are captured.

discovery.approval_evidence: User approved discovery agreement via inline Tier A reply: `approve`. Discovery findings and agreement.md captured objectives, AC, constraints, avoidances, parent-branch baseline requirement, and host/tool notification direction.

design.approval_evidence: Design completed inline. Validator verdict: CAUTION, with clarifications applied: `rq-titleBell01` must be created in this trunk-based branch and message.updated/mainSessionId removal must be audited for bell-only usage. No unresolved conflict, no user-value tradeoff, no contract-compromise risk.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep plan via inline Tier A reply: `approve`. Task graph has 4 tasks with TDD intent, dependencies, and verification coverage for AC1–AC7.

execution.approval_evidence: All 4 planned execution tasks completed with checkpoint commits. Final verification passed: focused terminal/events/drift suites, `pnpm run check`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm run build`, runtime BEL/notification pattern audit, and raw BEL byte audit.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered work via inline Tier A reply: `accept`. Review verdict APPROVED. All blocker/issue findings fixed; accepted suggestions remediated or tracked as non-blocking follow-up ag-eD_gUHiR. Verification green: focused suites, `pnpm run check`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm run build`, runtime no-BEL/no-OSC-notification audit, raw BEL byte audit.

release.approval_evidence: User signed off final archive/release via Tier B reply: `sign off`. Harden/release checks passed: focused suites, `pnpm run check`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm run build`, runtime no-BEL/no-OSC-notification audit, raw BEL byte audit, clean git tree, and successful merge dry-run with trunk.

clarify_findings.message: Proposal has no Success Criteria section. How will we know this change is done?
Proposal has no Scope section. What files and modules will be affected?
Proposal describes behavior that could fail but doesn't mention error handling or rollback. What happens when things go wrong?
